lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ਅਲਾਹ ਦੀ ਜਾਪੈ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat niraalee alaah dee jaapai gur veechaar |
lines.english: The worship of the Lord is unique - it is known only by reflecting upon the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸੈ ਭੈ ਭਗਤੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥੯॥੧੪॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam hiradai vasai bhai bhagatee naam savaar |9|14|36|
lines.english: O Nanak, one whose mind is filled with the Naam, through the Lord's Fear and devotion, is embellished with the Naam. ||9||14||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਭੋਲਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੈ ਦੁਖ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: an ras meh bholaaeaa bin naamai dukh paae |
lines.english: He wanders around, engrossed in other pleasures, but without the Naam, he suffers in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਵਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਖਿ ਸਾਦੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: e man mere baavale har ras chakh saad paae |
lines.english: O my insane mind, drink in the sublime essence of the Lord, and savor its taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਜਿ ਸਚੀ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh na bhettio ji sachee boojh bujhaae |1|
lines.english: He does not meet the True Guru, the Primal Being, who imparts true understanding. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਤੂੰ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: an ras laagaa toon fireh birathaa janam gavaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Attached to other pleasures, you wander around, and your life wastes away uselessly. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh guramukh niramale sach naam raheh liv laae |
lines.english: In this age, the Gurmukhs are pure; they remain absorbed in the love of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vin karamaa kichh paaeeai nahee kiaa kar kahiaa jaae |2|
lines.english: Without the destiny of good karma, nothing can be obtained; what can we say or do? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਮਨਹੁ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaaneh sabad mareh manahu taj vikaar |
lines.english: He understands his own self, and dies in the Word of the Shabad; he banishes corruption from his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sukh na paaeeai naa dukh vichahu jaae |
lines.english: Without the Name, peace is not obtained, and pain does not depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜਿ ਪਏ ਬਖਸੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur saranaaee bhaj pe bakhase bakhasanahaar |3|
lines.english: He hurries to the Guru's Sanctuary, and is forgiven by the Forgiving Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਪਿਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dohaaganee pir kee saar na jaanahee kiaa kar kareh seegaar |
lines.english: The forsaken soul-brides do not know the value of their Husband Lord; how can they decorate themselves?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: eihu jag maaeaa mohi viaapiaa doojai bharam bhulaae |4|
lines.english: This world is engrossed in attachment to Maya; it has gone astray in duality and doubt. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਜਲਦੀਆ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸੇਜੈ ਰਵੈ ਨ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa jaladeea fireh sejai ravai na bhataar |5|
lines.english: Night and day, they continually burn, and they do not enjoy the Bed of their Husband Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੀਆ ਅਪਣੇ ਸਹਿ ਲਈਆ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee seegaareea apane seh leea milaae |6|
lines.english: They decorate themselves with the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and their Husband Lord unites them with Himself. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee mehal paaeaa vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: The happy soul-brides obtain the Mansion of His Presence, eradicating their self-conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਭੀ ਮਰਹਿ ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਹੋਹਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: manamukh mar mar jameh bhee mareh jam dar hohi khuaar |7|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs die again and again, and are reborn; they die again, and are miserable at the Gate of Death. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣਾ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maranaa manahu visaariaa maaeaa mohu gubaar |
lines.english: He has forgotten death, in the darkness of attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਸੇ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aap milaaeian se mile gur sabad veechaar |
lines.english: They alone are united, whom the Lord unites with Himself; they contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥੮॥੨੨॥੧੫॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaane mukh ujale tith sachai darabaar |8|22|15|37|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are absorbed in the Naam; their faces are radiant, in that True Court. ||8||22||15||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਵਸਾਏ ਪੰਚ ਗਵਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panch vasaae panch gavaae |1|
lines.english: I enshrined the five within myself, and cast out the other five. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 asattapadeea ghar 2 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਮਨਾਏ ਪੰਚ ਰੁਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: panch manaae panch rusaae |
lines.english: When the five virtues were reconciled, and the five passions were estranged,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਤੁ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: durat geaa gur giaan drirraaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Vice departed, and the Guru's spiritual wisdom was implanted within me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨੑ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਗਰੁ ਵੁਠਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eina bidh nagar vutthaa mere bhaaee |
lines.english: In this way, the village of my body became inhabited, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚ ਧਰਮ ਕੀ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saach dharam kee kar deenee vaar |
lines.english: The fence of true Dharmic religion has been built around it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਰਹੇ ਮੁਹਕਮ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: farahe muhakam gur giaan beechaar |2|
lines.english: The spiritual wisdom and reflective meditation of the Guru has become its strong gate. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਖੇਤੀ ਬੀਜਹੁ ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: naam khetee beejahu bhaaee meet |
lines.english: So plant the seed of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O friends, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਏਕੈ ਥਾਟ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saah vaapaaree ekai thaatt |4|
lines.english: The Banker and the dealers dwell in the same place. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਉਦਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਨੀਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saudaa karahu gur sevahu neet |3|
lines.english: Deal only in the constant service of the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਹਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: saant sehaj sukh ke sabh haatt |
lines.english: With intuitive peace and happiness, all the shops are filled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਜੀਆ ਡੰਨੁ ਕੋ ਲਏ ਨ ਜਗਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jejeea ddan ko le na jagaat |
lines.english: There is no tax on non-believers, nor any fines or taxes at death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਧੁਰ ਕੀ ਛਾਪ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur kar deenee dhur kee chhaap |5|
lines.english: The True Guru has set the Seal of the Primal Lord upon these goods. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਖਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਦਿ ਖੇਪ ਚਲਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: vakhar naam lad khep chalaavahu |
lines.english: So load the merchandise of the Naam, and set sail with your cargo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਲਾਹਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਵਹੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: lai laahaa guramukh ghar aavahu |6|
lines.english: Earn your profit, as Gurmukh, and you shall return to your own home. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਿਖ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saahu sikh vanajaare |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Banker, and His Sikhs are the traders.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂੰਜੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਸਾਚੁ ਸਮ੍ਹਾਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: poonjee naam lekhaa saach samhaare |7|
lines.english: Their merchandise is the Naam, and meditation on the True Lord is their account. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਵਸੈ ਇਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: so vasai it ghar jis gur pooraa sev |
lines.english: One who serves the True Guru dwells in this house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਚਲ ਨਗਰੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਵ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: abichal nagaree naanak dev |8|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Divine City is eternal. ||8||1||
